evals.description: Tests if the agent successfully rewrites a basic Notes app listing using a competitor brief from a slow, bloated competitor (e.g., Evernote).
expected_outputs: Identifies 'Slow load times' and 'Bloated features' as key pain points.
Outputs an iOS Title under 30 characters.
Outputs an Android Short Description under 80 characters.
Uses a Ju-Jitsu hook emphasizing speed and simplicity without naming the competitor.
